name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient document conversion causes late submissions. We automate document formatting instead of manual document formatting and submission.
problem_solved: Inefficient document conversion for claims submissions
